'''Gallie Wover''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gunnery Sergeant]] who served with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. She was stationed aboard the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Adamantine]]'' when the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] transported [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], and later [[Death/Legends|died]] of the [[Death Seed]] [[plague]]. Long before her time on the ''Adamantine'', she had worked in merchant [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] for fifteen years after [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had formed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
